title: Questing Craft
description: A modpack focusing on exploration, rewarding it and providing a world that feels alive.
body:
A modpack focusing on exploration, rewarding it and providing a world that feels alive.
simple skills, farming expansions, exploration rewards, and a vibrant world are just the start.
imo, its very vanila++, and still has that timeless minecraft feel to it.

Worldgen:
In this regard, i was inspired by skyrim, and attempted to make a world worth exploring, and that felt inhabited. 
- Dunegeons and taverns
- Geophilic
- Philips ruins
- Ore deposits
- Towns and towers
- Universal ores
- Waystones
- Yung's suite

Husbandry:
Here, i wanted to focus on what you do once you return from and adventure, to enable the player to make their home really feel like home
- Items displayed
- Farmers delight
- More delight

Gameplay:
These are mostly QoL mods. removing clunk and promoting getting back out there to explore!
- Artifacts
- Bountiful
- Carry on
- Compress it!
- Copper hopper
- Falling tree
- Explorers compass
- Natures compass
- Trinkets
- Elytra trinket
- Dark enchanting
- Inmis
- Inventorio
- Inventory management
- Itemswapper
- Kneeslabs
- Pufferfish's skills
- Quick right click
- Portable crates
- Spawn animations
- Trade cycling
- Villager pickup
- Universal graves
- Xaero's world map & minimap (minimap is turned off, only used for waypoints)
- Appleskin

Visual & immersion:
Improving the visuals of minecraft to make them easier on the eyes and more immersive is very fun, and i hope i struck the right balance.
- Ambient sounds
- Falling leaves
- Eating animation
- Lamb dynamic lights
- Motschen's better leaves
- Particle rain
- Nyf's spiders
- Reimagined (resource pack)
- Sound physics remastered
- Visuality

all other mods are either performance or just not worth mentioning
